# Xplania

> AI travel companion that plans, budgets, packs, tracks and journals your trips. Personalized recommendations, live trip tracking, public sharing and beautiful travel journals — built for travelers, not generic trip databases.

Xplania combines several travel tools in one app: an AI trip planner, a smart packing guide, a budget guide with currency conversion, a visa & vaccines guide that pulls from official sources, a live trip tracker, a mood-based explorer and a travel journal you can publish as a public page.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, FAQ and signup.
- [Budget guide](/guide-budget): Build a realistic per-day budget with AI tips and a live currency converter.
- [Packing guide](/guide-valise): Generate a smart packing list adapted to destination, weather and trip style.
- [Visa & vaccines guide](/guide-visa): Visa formalities, vaccines and safety advisories synthesized from official sources (France Diplomatie, Institut Pasteur, WHO).
- [Plans & pricing](/offres): Free quota, premium packs and launch waitlist.
- [About](/about): What Xplania is, who it's for and the team behind it.
- [Trust & security](/trust): How Xplania protects user data, opt-in sharing model and security contact.

## Legal

- [Privacy policy](/privacy-policy): What data is collected and how it is used.
- [Terms of use](/terms-of-use): Rules for using the service.
- [Legal notice](/legal-notice): Publisher and hosting information.
